profile.imageAlt: Ahmed Zewar - AI & Digital Strategy Consultant in Kuwait

About.title: About Me
About.intro: With over 20 years of experience spanning AI infrastructure, full-stack development, and digital marketing, I help businesses leverage cutting-edge technology to achieve measurable growth. From building AI agent systems and knowledge graph architectures to executing ROI-driven digital campaigns — I deliver end-to-end solutions across Kuwait & GCC.
About.current: Currently serving as Digital Solutions Manager at Smart Technology (STSCKW) in Kuwait, while also delivering freelance AI consulting, full-stack development, and digital strategy services. Available online worldwide and in-person across Kuwait.

Services.title: Services & Expertise
Services.subtitle: From AI agent development to digital marketing — strategic solutions that transform businesses. Technology meets results.

items.title: AI Agent Solutions & Automation
items.description: Custom AI agent development, LLM orchestration, and intelligent automation systems that transform how your business operates and scales.

items.title: Full-Stack Development
items.description: Modern web applications built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Python. From bilingual Arabic/English platforms to complex enterprise systems.

items.title: E-commerce & Shopify Solutions
items.description: Complete e-commerce ecosystem optimized for the Kuwait market. Shopify expertise with KNET payment integration and local delivery solutions.

items.title: Digital Marketing & SEO
items.description: Data-driven digital marketing strategies tailored for Kuwait and GCC markets. Bilingual campaigns that drive measurable ROI.

items.title: Government & Enterprise Consulting
items.description: Digital transformation consulting for government sector and enterprise organizations. Modular architecture design with compliance-first approach.

items.title: Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
items.description: Scalable cloud infrastructure with edge computing, self-hosted solutions, and modern DevOps practices for performance and cost optimization.

Testimonials.title: Client Feedback
Testimonials.subtitle: Results from businesses that partnered with Ahmed Zewar for digital transformation.

items.name: Khaled M.
items.quote: The e-commerce transformation tripled our conversion rate and streamlined our fulfillment process across Kuwait with proper KNET integration and city-level shipping.

items.name: Noura A.
items.quote: Ahmed designed a modular digital platform handling complex workflows across 12 departments with full Arabic RTL support and state-machine driven processes.

items.name: Faisal R.
items.quote: Our social media engagement grew by 400% under Ahmed's direction, making us the leading brand in our sector with 500K+ followers across platforms.

items.name: Maha S.
items.quote: Ahmed built our bilingual medical website with modern design, Arabic/English support, and exceptional performance on Cloudflare — exactly what our patients needed.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.subtitle: Selected projects showcasing AI, development, and digital strategy results

items.title: AI Knowledge Graph Platform
items.description: Built a dual-brain architecture combining SQL and graph databases with RRF fusion search, deployed as a Cloudflare Worker gateway with 15 hardened API tools and auto-extraction via LLM

items.title: Government Sector Digital Platform
items.description: Designed and developed a modular monolith platform with 8 bounded contexts, AI microservice layer, and state-machine driven workflow for a major government institution

items.title: E-commerce Platform Transformation
items.description: Led complete overhaul of e-commerce platform including Shopify optimization, KNET payment integration, and Kuwait city-level shipping configuration

items.title: Enterprise Social Media Strategy
items.description: Built enterprise social media presence from ground up for a major telecommunications provider, managing multi-channel content strategy and community engagement

items.title: Bilingual Healthcare Platform
items.description: Full-stack Next.js bilingual medical website with Arabic/English RTL support, deployed on Cloudflare with modern responsive design and SEO optimization

items.title: Multi-Channel Digital Campaign
items.description: Developed and executed comprehensive digital marketing strategy across social media, PPC, and email for a consumer products brand in the Kuwait market
